name: Geddes Federal Savings And Loan Association
description_short: Geddes Federal Savings and Loan Association is a local community bank in Syracuse, NY offering mortgages, home equity products, deposit accounts, and online banking services.
description_long: Geddes Federal Savings and Loan Association has served the Syracuse, New York community for generations as a local financial institution. The company positions itself as a community-focused alternative to larger national banks, emphasizing personalized service and local decision-making for its members. The institution offers a comprehensive range of banking products including mortgage loans (including ARM options), home equity lines of credit, home equity loans, checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit, and retirement savings products. They provide online account access, mobile banking with check deposit functionality, online loan applications, and ATM access through their network. Current rate offerings include competitive mortgage rates (such as a 10-1 ARM at 5.831% APR) and CD specials (7-month CDs at 4.13% APY). Geddes Federal distinguishes itself through its local ownership structure, neighborhood presence in Syracuse, and emphasis on personalized service. The website highlights that customers receive service from their neighbors rather than distant corporate entities. They offer financial calculators for mortgages, loans, and savings planning, plus fraud and consumer protection alerts. The institution has implemented accessibility features including AudioEye technology on their website. As a traditional savings and loan association, Geddes Federal is best suited for Syracuse-area residents seeking mortgage financing or local banking relationships. The institution's product offerings and rate competitiveness appear reasonable, though the website provides limited detail on fee structures, minimum account balances, or specific eligibility requirements. Their digital banking capabilities appear functional but modest compared to larger national institutions.
services: Financial calculators for mortgages, loans, and savings
pros: Local community bank with generations of service to Syracuse, NY area
Comprehensive product suite: mortgages, HELOCs, home equity loans, checking, savings, CDs, retirement accounts
Online mortgage application available to avoid paperwork and work on own schedule
Mobile check deposit convenience through mobile banking app
Online and mobile banking available 24/7 for account monitoring and management
Financial calculators provided for mortgages, loans, and savings planning
Publishes current rates and offers (ARM special, CD special, HELOC rates) with APR/APY transparency
Accessibility features including AudioEye toolbar for assistive technologies
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Syracuse, NY area only
Website provides minimal information on fee schedules, minimum balance requirements, or specific loan terms
No mention of FDIC insurance, safety ratings, or regulatory compliance details
Digital banking interface appears basic compared to major national banks and online-only institutions
Limited information about customer support availability or response times outside business hours
best_for: Syracuse, NY area residents seeking mortgage financing from a local lender
Homeowners interested in home equity lines of credit or home equity loans with local service
Consumers preferring relationship banking and community-based financial institutions over large national banks
diagnosis: Geddes Federal is best for Syracuse, NY residents who prioritize local banking relationships and personalized service for mortgage lending or comprehensive deposit/loan products. The main caveat is that this institution's geographic service area is limited to the Syracuse region, making it inaccessible for customers outside that area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: Geddes Federal Savings and Loan Association
